projectDescription: A graph-based personal knowledge library that lets you catalog books, films, articles, videos, courses, and games as nodes, connect them with typed relations, and use AI (Groq/llama-3.1-8b) to classify and link new entries automatically.
keyFeatures: Graph-based knowledge organization with nodes and typed directed relations
Six content types: books (libro), films (pelicula), articles (articulo), videos, courses (curso), and video games (videojuego)
Nine semantic relation types (es_autor_de, trata_sobre, influyo_a, similar_a, etc.)
AI-powered smart-add: paste a description and the LLM classifies it and suggests relations to existing nodes
Interactive force-directed graph visualization with zoom, pan, drag, and type filtering
Curated lists with ordering and per-node ratings
Full-text search across titles, descriptions, authors, and tags
Monorepo with a Hono (TypeScript) API server and a React/Vite SPA client
PostgreSQL persistence via Drizzle ORM with auto-migrations and seed data
One-click deployment to Render via render.yaml
publicApiSurface: GET /api/nodes — list nodes with optional type/status filters
GET /api/relations — list relations with optional sourceId/targetId filters
POST /api/ai/classify — classify text and suggest node + relations (no DB write)
POST /api/ai/smart-add — classify text, persist node, and persist suggested relations
GET /api/lists/:id — get list with its ordered nodes
POST /api/lists/:id/nodes — add a node to a list
DELETE /api/lists/:id/nodes/:nodeId — remove a node from a list
PUT /api/lists/:id/nodes/:nodeId/rating — rate a node within a list
PUT /api/lists/:id/nodes/reorder — reorder nodes in a list
